properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Gross darkness has covered the land And the cold winter winds has blown But alas I saw the light shining through I behold my beloved on high Looking towards me His bride Providing a way of escape Coming to pick me up Rapture me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Saying winter is over and gone So come away The flowers are blooming again So come away The time of the singing has come So come away, my love Come away… come away

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: As I’m building this mountain for Him A dwelling place He can be pleased I saw Him descending from heaven With shouting… Grace: Grace… grace

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: In the clefts of the rock In the secret place I have heard Your voice telling me Thou art fair my love Thou art beautiful, come away Come away…
